/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/dmitriygerasimov/work/cellframe/cellframe-node.rc-6.0/plugin/plugin-python/python-dap/lib/python_cellframe_common.dylib -install_name @rpath/python_cellframe_common.dylib CMakeFiles/python_cellframe_common.dir/src/python_dap_core.c.o CMakeFiles/python_cellframe_common.dir/src/python_dap_config.c.o CMakeFiles/python_cellframe_common.dir/src/python_dap_crypto.c.o CMakeFiles/python_cellframe_common.dir/src/python_dap_network.c.o CMakeFiles/python_cellframe_common.dir/src/python_dap_system.c.o CMakeFiles/python_cellframe_common.dir/src/python_dap_common.c.o  dap-sdk/core/libdap_core.a -ldap_crypto -ldap_io -ldap_global_db /opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.13/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/lib/libpython3.13.dylib dap-sdk/core/src/unix/libdap_core_unix.a dap-sdk/core/src/darwin/libdap_core_darwin.a dap-sdk/core/libdap_core.a dap-sdk/core/src/unix/libdap_core_unix.a dap-sdk/core/src/darwin/libdap_core_darwin.a dap-sdk/core/json-c/libdap_json-c.a -lm -lpthread
